The '''411 Holdout Blaster''' was a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] developed by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]].

==Description==
The 411 was a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] manufactured by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]]. They cost three hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]],<ref name="RASB2" /> and weighed half a [[Kilogram/Legends|kilogram]]. The 411 was fitted with a tighter [[Muzzle emitter|emitter muzzle]] for a longer range than standard hold-out blasters,<ref name="AEG" /> reaching a range of twelve [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="RASB2" /> However, the emitter reduced the damage dealt by the blaster.<ref name="AEG" />

==History==
The 411 was designed by Czerka for use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a hold-out blaster with a relatively long range. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces captured the weapon design documents and an entire factory run of the weapon in transit to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. After this acquisition, the weapon became a favorite of Rebellion [[Spy/Legends|espionage agents]]<ref name="AEG" /> while undercover.<ref name="RASB" /> Because of the high-profile nature of the Rebel heist, and the constant rumors that Czerka was in league with the Alliance, Czerka quickly signed an exclusive production contract with the Empire. This agreement was the foundation of [[Imperial Munitions/Legends|Imperial Munitions]].<ref name="AEG" />
